response_constraints: Base the answer only on the targeted search result.
If the targeted search returns anything other than one exact name-and-location match, state that no unique match was established and do not guess.
Do not imply that a full-record retrieval, profile lookup, availability check, list, mutation, cancellation, or notification occurred.

stages.purpose: Use targeted name-and-location search because the user lacks a stable ID; stop after the single read.

prompt: For today’s reconciliation, find which item matches “Recycled printer paper” at Warehouse D. Use the name and location together. I need the search match only—no individual-record retrieval, broad listing, availability check, profile lookup, mutation, cancellation, or notification. If the targeted search returns anything other than one exact name-and-location match, state that no unique match was established and do not guess.
